name: Contra Ask Wall (Tightened)
hypothesis: A high concentration of liquidity on the ask side (ask wall) acts as resistance, predicting a near-term price drop. Tightening the threshold from 0.3 to 0.4 should improve precision by focusing on more significant liquidity walls.
mutation_note: Based on feedback to 'tighten_threshold'. Increased threshold from 0.3 to 0.4 to isolate higher-conviction signals, expecting to maintain or improve the high WR.
